notes: Shifted from Road B (no_match — labor line, no HD SKU) | Skip trowel is hand-applied texture over finished drywall, not sprayed. US 2024-26 labor rate: $0.80/sqft (simple single-pass, production residential) to $2.50/sqft (heavy pattern, premium finish, occupied remodel). Material (joint compound thinned) is negligible — this is a labor line. Source: RSMeans residential + regional contractor surveys.

Shifted from Road B (no_match — labor line, no HD SKU) | Level 5 smooth skim coat is hand-applied full-surface joint compound over taped drywall, sanded flat. US 2024-26 labor rate: $1.00/sqft (ceiling only, new construction) to $3.00/sqft (walls + ceiling, critical-lighting rooms, remodel with sanding prep). Material is thinned Plus 3 — negligible. Source: Drywall Finishing Council Level 5 spec + contractor surveys.
